ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's data */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the security */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price from the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the security */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, guest) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES historical_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial indicator (e.g., P/E Ratio, Dividend Yield) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial indicator data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial indicator (e.g., valuation, profitability) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the indicator is updated (e.g., daily, quarterly, annually) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the indicator based on data quality and source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_indicators_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful data synchronization */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is synchronized (e.g., every 15 minutes, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., theme, notification frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "theme_color" TEXT /* Preferred color theme (e.g., light, dark, blue) */,
  "preferred_indicators" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred financial indicators */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address for notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingestion log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which data was ingested */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date the data was ingested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion process (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or error details related to the ingestion */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ingestion process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ingestion process ended */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records ingested */,
  "errors" TEXT /* JSON array of errors encountered during ingestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
